nasb.text: who were clothed in purple, governors and officials, all of them desirable young men, horsemen riding on horses.

esv.text: clothed in purple, governors and commanders, all of them desirable young men, horsemen riding on horses.

cnv.text: 他們穿著紫色衣服，是作總督和省長的；他們都是英俊的年輕人，是騎著馬的騎兵。

ccb.text: 他们都是身穿紫衣的省长和总督，都是英俊的年轻骑士。
